name: tarf-website
description: Tarf (طَرْف) — download + Support/Donate static site with serverless donation + webhook.

scripts.lint: node --check api/donate.js && node --check api/webhook.js && node --check api/_lib/gateways.js && node --check api/_lib/validate.js
scripts.build: node -e "console.log('static site — no build step; pages are served as-is')"
